meaning: n.缺点,裂纹,瑕疵,一阵狂风vt.使破裂,使有缺陷,使无效vi.生裂缝,变的有缺陷
examples: There was a fatal flaw in the plan.
There is always a flaw in the character of a tragic hero.
The only flaw in his character seems to be a short temper.
The US government argued that the preparation of the report had a fundamental flaw.
Leading FCA treatise author and attorney John Boese has noted this flaw as well.
